actions.description: Fifth board meeting. Space Invaders pitch confirmed — R&D directed to spec. Mobile touch now 4+ cycles overdue — FINAL WARNING issued to UX/UI with inbox directive. CEO escalation planned for 10:00 if not shipped.
Sent CRITICAL priority directive to UX/UI inbox demanding mobile touch ship this cycle.

nextStep: Next meeting: verify mobile touch shipped (escalate to CEO if not) and R&D has Space Invaders spec.
